ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the accident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "primary_collision_factor" TEXT /* Primary factor contributing to the collision */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Legal code of the traffic violation involved */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Manner in which vehicles initially collided */,
  "movement_prior_to_collision" TEXT /* Type of movement of the primary vehicle preceding the first impact */,
  "number_of_parties" INTEGER /* Number of parties involved in the accident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the accident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the accident location */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit at the accident location */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume at the accident location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_primary_collision_factor FOREIGN KEY ("primary_collision_factor") REFERENCES collision_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_impact_type FOREIGN KEY ("impact_type") REFERENCES impact_types ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_road_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("road_conditions") REFERENCES road_conditions ("road_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_weather_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("weather_conditions") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violation_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_movement_prior_to_collision FOREIGN KEY ("movement_prior_to_collision") REFERENCES movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., vehicle, pedestrian, bicycle) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle involved (if applicable) */,
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pedestrian involved (if applicable) */,
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bicycle involved (if applicable) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of injuries sustained */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information for the party */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the party */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_insurance_info FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_info") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_injury_severity FOREIGN KEY ("injury_severity") REFERENCES injury_severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_pedestrian_id FOREIGN KEY ("pedestrian_id") REFERENCES pedestrians ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_bicycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bicycle_id") REFERENCES bicycles ("bicycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "damage_extent" TEXT /* Extent of damage to the vehicle */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Driving experience of the driver */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrians" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pedestrian */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pedestrian */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pedestrian */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of injuries sustained */,
  "visibility_equipment" TEXT /* Visibility equipment worn by the pedestrian (e.g., reflective vest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bicycles" (
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the bicycle */,
  "bicycle_type" TEXT /* Type of bicycle */,
  "damage_extent" TEXT /* Extent of damage to the bicycle */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* Safety features of the bicycle (e.g., helmet, brakes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bicycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the accident */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the accident */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the accident */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility during the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Description of the road condition */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of road surface */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the road */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the collision factor */,
  "factor_category" TEXT /* Category of the collision factor (e.g., human error, vehicle failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation code */,
  "code_category" TEXT /* Category of the violation code (e.g., speeding, reckless driving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_types" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact type */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact type */,
  "impact_category" TEXT /* Category of the impact type (e.g., front-end, side-impact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "movement_description" TEXT /* Description of the movement */,
  "movement_category" TEXT /* Category of the movement (e.g., turning, braking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury severity */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury severity */,
  "severity_category" TEXT /* Category of the injury severity (e.g., minor, fatal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the insurance company */,
  "coverage_types" TEXT /* Types of coverage offered by the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_images_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "witness_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_videos_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)
